expression_attribute_names.description: A map of attribute names to use in an expression, allowing you to substitute and avoid conflicts with reserved keywords.

key.description: The primary key of the item you want to work with, which uniquely identifies the item in the DynamoDB table.

projection_expression.description: A string that specifies the attributes you want to retrieve from the DynamoDB table, limiting the data you retrieve.

table_name.description: The name of the DynamoDB table where the item is stored or will be stored.
